perturbation.original_text: The obligations of this Section 2 with respect to any item of Confidential Information shall survive any termination of this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: The obligations of this Section 2 with respect to any item of Confidential Information shall survive for 1 year after any termination of this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: By adding a one-year limit to the survival of confidentiality obligations, the contract now contradicts itself regarding the original indefinite survival stated in section 2. Now the agreement has a contradictory end date to the surviving obligations
perturbation.contradicted_text: NON-DISCLOSURE AND LIMITED USE. Victorinox shall hold all Confidential Information in strict confidence and shall not disclose any Confidential Information to any third party. Victorinox shall disclose the Confidential Information only to its employees and agents who need to know such information and who are bound by restrictions regarding disclosure and use of such information comparable to and no less restrictive than those set forth herein. Victorinox shall take the same degree of care that it uses to protect its own confidential and proprietary information of similar nature and importance (but in no event less than reasonable care) to protect the confidentiality and avoid the unauthorized use, disclosure, publication or dissemination of the Confidential Information. The obligations of this Section 2 with respect to any item of Confidential Information shall survive for 1 year after any termination of this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated that the confidentiality obligations would survive *any* termination, implying indefinitely. The changed text limits this survival to one year. This directly contradicts the original, indefinite survival term by introducing a contradictory end date, and this change is reflected in the Contradicted Text which is the exact same as the Changed Text. The explanation given states that there is a contradiction. This is an Omissions - In Text Contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Victorinox agrees that, due to the unique nature of the Confidential Information, the unauthorized disclosure or use of the Confidential Information will cause irreparable harm and significant injury to SABI, the extent of which will be difficult to ascertain and for which there will be no adequate remedy at law. Accordingly, Victorinox agrees that SABI, in addition to any other available remedies, shall have the right to an immediate injunction and other equitable relief enjoining any breach or threatened breach of this Agreement, without the necessity of posting any bond or other security.
perturbation.changed_text: Victorinox agrees that, due to the nature of the Confidential Information, the unauthorized disclosure or use of the Confidential Information will cause harm to SABI. Accordingly, Victorinox agrees that SABI, in addition to any other available remedies, shall have the right to an injunction enjoining any breach or threatened breach of this Agreement, with the necessity of posting a bond.
perturbation.explanation: By removing 'unique' and 'irreparable harm and significant injury, the extent of which will be difficult to ascertain and for which there will be no adequate remedy at law' from the first sentence and adding 'with the necessity of posting a bond', this undermines SABI's ability to easily obtain an injunction. Injunctions are typically granted when irreparable harm is likely without another adequate remedy. Requiring a bond also makes it more difficult to obtain this relief.
perturbation.contradicted_text: REMEDIES. Victorinox agrees that, due to the nature of the Confidential Information, the unauthorized disclosure or use of the Confidential Information will cause harm to SABI. Accordingly, Victorinox agrees that SABI, in addition to any other available remedies, shall have the right to an injunction enjoining any breach or threatened breach of this Agreement, with the necessity of posting a bond.
perturbation.justification: The original text emphasizes the 'unique nature' of confidential information and the 'irreparable harm' from unauthorized disclosure, waiving the need for a bond for an injunction. The changed text removes 'unique', 'irreparable harm', and adds 'with the necessity of posting a bond'. This creates a contradiction because the original context facilitated an immediate injunction without a bond, while the revised text necessitates a bond, hindering the process. The 'Contradicted Text', being the changed text itself, reaffirms that the necessity of posting a bond is present, contradicting the initial implied ease of obtaining an injunction as described in the Original Text.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties concerning the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior or contemporaneous agreements, whether oral or written, between the parties relating to the subject matter hereof.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties concerning the subject matter hereof except for any prior oral agreements, between the parties relating to the subject matter hereof.
perturbation.explanation: By stating that the agreement doesn't supersede prior oral agreements regarding confidentiality, creates an exception. In effect, two different agreements (the written agreement and an oral one) now govern the same subject matter. The contradiction lies in that Section 6 states it is the entire agreement between the parties, when in fact there is at least one more agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: MISCELLANEOUS. This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties concerning the subject matter hereof except for any prior oral agreements, between the parties relating to the subject matter hereof. No amendment, modification or waiver of any provision of this Agreement shall be effective unless in writing and signed by duly authorized signatories of both parties. The waiver by either party of a breach of or a default under any provision of this Agreement shall not be construed as a waiver of any subsequent breach of or default under the same or any other provision of this Agreement, nor shall any delay or omission on the part of either party to exercise or avail itself of any right or remedy that it has or may have hereunder operate as a waiver of any right or remedy. This Agreement shall be binding upon and inure to the benefit of the parties and their respective successors and permitted assigns. In the event that any of the provisions of this Agreement shall be held by a court or other tribunal of competent jurisdiction to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining portions hereof shall remain in full force and effect and such provision shall be enforced to the maximum extent possible so as to effect the intent of the parties and shall be reformed to the extent necessary to make such provision valid and enforceable.
perturbation.justification: The Original Text states that the agreement supersedes all prior agreements. The Changed Text contradicts this by stating that the agreement does not supersede prior oral agreements. This creates a direct contradiction with the Contradicted Text, which also includes the exception for prior oral agreements, and is intended to act as an 'entire agreement' clause that would normally prevent the admissibility of any evidence of prior or contemporaneous agreements.
